project.description: 危险操作排队 (per-server FIFO 互斥 + 超时杀 + 配置可调 + audit): - api/ OpType / OpStatus / ProgressSink - api/spi/ OperationOrchestrator / OperationHandler / OperationContext / OpConfigResolver - api/dto/ EnqueueRequest - api/event/ OpProgressEvent / OpConfigChangedEvent - enums/ OpErrorCode - config/ OpTimeoutProperties / OpOrchestratorProperties (yml fallback 默认值) - dal/dataobject/ OpLogDO / OpConfigDO - dal/mysql/mapper/ OpLogMapper (CAS 内核) / OpLogQueryMapper (UI) / OpConfigMapper - service/ OpLogService / OpConfigService - internal/orchestrator/ DefaultOperationOrchestrator + ServerSlot + HandlerRegistry + OpWatchdog + DefaultOperationContext - internal/resolver/ DefaultOpConfigResolver (DB → yml → 兜底 三级 fallback, 带缓存) - internal/startup/ OpStartupCleaner (僵尸 RUNNING 清理) + OpConfigBootstrapper (按 OpType 补行) - internal/progress/ws/ WebSocket 进度推送 - OperationAutoConfiguration 顶层装配 其他 biz 模块要用排队能力, 直接依赖本模块, 写自己的 OperationHandler + 在 api/OpType 加枚举值即可.
